Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: Icon that will appear below the player's healthbar when this effect is active

Fields.Name: Trigger at HP Below %
Fields.Description: SpEffect will not be applied until HP is at or below this threshold

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Duration of the SpEffect -1=Infinite 0=One frame

Fields.Name: Trigger Interval
Fields.Description: Amount of times the effect will be applied over it's duration, primarily used for healing or damage over time effects

Fields.Name: Max HP %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum Hp

Fields.Name: Max FP %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum Fp/Mp

Fields.Name: Max Stamina %
Fields.Description: Multiplies maximum stamina

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Slash
Fields.Description: Slash damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Strike
Fields.Description: Batter damage ratio: The calculated damage is corrected by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Thrust
Fields.Description: Puncture damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Standard
Fields.Description: Non-attribute damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Magic
Fields.Description: Magic damage multiplier: The calculated damage is corrected by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Fire
Fields.Description: Flame damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Absorption %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Electric shock damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Physical
Fields.Description: Physical damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Magic
Fields.Description: Magic damage multiplier: The calculated damage is corrected by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Fire
Fields.Description: Flame damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Electric shock damage ratio: Correct the calculated damage by XX times. 1 is normal.

Fields.Name: Power %: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiply the physical attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Power %: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiply the magic attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Power %: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiply the fire attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Power %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiply the electric shock attack power by the set value

Fields.Name: Damage +: Physical
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for physical attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Magic
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the magic attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Fire
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the flame attack power

Fields.Name: Damage +: Lighting
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the electric shock attack power

Fields.Name: Defence %: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiply the set value for physical defense

Fields.Name: Defence %: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiply the value set for magic defense

Fields.Name: Defence %: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiply the fire defense by the set value

Fields.Name: Defence %: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiply the value set for the electric shock defense

Fields.Name: Defence +: Physical
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for physical defense

Fields.Name: Defence +: Magic
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for magic defense

Fields.Name: Defence +: Fire
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the fire defense

Fields.Name: Defence +: Lightning
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the value set for the electric shock defense

Fields.Name: No Guard Damage %
Fields.Description: Replace the damage multiplier at the time of opening with the set value (set on the damage side)

Fields.Name: Vital Spot Change %
Fields.Description: Alters the damage multiplier defined in Jumptable 42

Fields.Name: Normal Hit Change %
Fields.Description: Alters the damage multiplier defined in Jumptable 59

Fields.Name: Max HP Change %
Fields.Description: Increases or decreases maximum HP by the set multiplier

Fields.Name: Behavior ID
Fields.Description: Spawns the behavior referenced, requires stateInfo 275

Fields.Name: Current HP %
Fields.Description: Multiplies Hp over the duration of the effect

Fields.Name: Current HP +
Fields.Description: Adds or removes Hp by a flat amount over the duration of the effect

Fields.Name: Current FP %
Fields.Description: Multiplies Fp/Mp over the duration of the effect

Fields.Name: Current FP +
Fields.Description: Adds or removes Fp/Mp by a flat amount over the duration of the effect

Fields.Name: FP Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: Changes recovery speed. Add or subtract from the standard recovery speed and initial recovery speed in the recovery calculation formula.

Fields.Name: Current Posture %
Fields.Description: Multiplies Posture over the duration of the effect

Fields.Name: Current Posture +
Fields.Description: Adds or removes Posture by a flat amount over the duration of the effect

Fields.Name: Posture Recovery Speed
Fields.Description: Alters Posture regen by a flat amount

Fields.Name: Magic Effect Time Change
Fields.Description: For only spells whose effect duration is set to 0.1 seconds or more, add or subtract the time set to the effect duration.

Fields.Name: Current Durability +
Fields.Description: Add or subtract the numerical value to the internal wear degree

Fields.Name: Max Durability
Fields.Description: Add the set value to the maximum value of the internal wear degree of durability.

Fields.Name: Attack %: Stamina
Fields.Description: Multiplies overall Posture damage

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Poison
Fields.Description: Applies Poison build-up, only works with stateInfo 2

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Terror
Fields.Description: Applies Terror build-up, only works with stateInfo 5

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Burn
Fields.Description: Applies Burn build-up, only work with stateInfo 6

Fields.Name: Aux Inflict +: Enfeeble
Fields.Description: Applies Enfeeble build-up, only works with stateInfo 116

Fields.Name: Fall Damage %
Fields.Description: Multiplies fall damage taken

Fields.Name: Sen Gain %
Fields.Description: Multiplies the amount of Sen dropped by enemies, requires stateInfo 76 and only works when applied to the player

Fields.Name: Max Equip Load %
Fields.Description: Multiplies Equip Load

Fields.Name: Item Weight %
Fields.Description: Multiplies Item Load

Fields.Name: Sen Gain +
Fields.Description: Adds or removes Sen from the player over the duration of the effect

Fields.Name: Anim ID Offset
Fields.Description: Changes the animation category used, only for Npc's

Fields.Name: Sen Possession Amount %
Fields.Description: Multiplies the amount of Sen dropped by enemies, only works when applied to enemies

Fields.Name: Target Priority
Fields.Description: Chance for an enemy to switch aggro targets to/away the effect's owner. Values range from -1 to 1. +1 = 100% chance to target owner instead of current target, -1 = 100% chance to target somebody else instead of current target (effect owner).

Fields.Name: AI Sight Reduction
Fields.Description: Give it to someone who can see it. The viewer is more likely to be excluded from the AI's visual search target. 0 is default

Fields.Name: AI Sight Discovery Add %
Fields.Description: Give it to someone who can see it. Increase rate of discovery points accumulated in the viewer's peripheral vision

Fields.Name: AI Judgment: Good Visibility
Fields.Description: When performing a lock judgment or AI visibility judgment, if the map visibility type of the hit where the target character is standing is 'good', replace it with this value before making the judgment.

Fields.Name: AI Judgment: Dark Visibility
Fields.Description: When performing lock judgment or AI visibility judgment, if the map visibility type of the hit where the target character is standing is 'darkness', replace it with this value before making the judgment.

Fields.Name: AI Judgment: Pitch Black Visibility
Fields.Description: When performing lock judgment or AI visibility judgment, if the map visibility type of the hit where the target character is standing is 'pitch darkness', replace it with this value before making the judgment.

Fields.Name: AI Sight Reduction Limit Type
Fields.Description: Give it to someone who can see it. Types of conditions under which the viewer's visual search cut is effective

Fields.Name: AI Hearing Reduction
Fields.Description: Call the person who will listen. Multiplier of the sound radius generated by itself. 1 is the default

Fields.Name: Animation Speed %
Fields.Description: Multiplies animation speed, only works in Dark Souls 1

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Poison
Fields.Description: Multiplies Poison build-up dealt

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Terror
Fields.Description: Multiplies Terror build-up dealt

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Burn
Fields.Description: Multiplies Burn build-up dealt

Fields.Name: Aux Resist %: Enfeeble
Fields.Description: Multiplies Enfeeble build-up dealt

Fields.Name: Soul Steal %
Fields.Description: Defense power against HP taken away from NPC by Soul Steal

Fields.Name: HP Recovery Effectiveness %
Fields.Description: Multiplies the Hp change in changeHpRate and changeHpPoint fields

Fields.Name: Chain SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Applies speffect once the parent effect's duration has expired

Fields.Name: Cycle SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Applies speffect when the parent effect is active

Fields.Name: Attack SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Applies speffect when an attack connects, only one can be applied at any given time and only works with stateInfo 152, 153, 62, and 64

Fields.Name: Guard Defense - Weapon Repel Power %
Fields.Description: Repelling defense power correction value when guarding

Fields.Name: Guard Stability %
Fields.Description: Stamina cut rate correction value when guarding

Fields.Name: Combat AI: Upwards Vision Angle
Fields.Description: Alters the upwards vision angle during a Combat AI state

Fields.Name: Combat AI: Downwards Vision Angle
Fields.Description: Alters the downwards vision angle during a Combat AI state

Fields.Name: Poise +
Fields.Description: Alters max super armor by a flat amount

Fields.Name: Attenuation Distance %
Fields.Description: Multiplies the attenuation range of bullets, requires stateInfo 168

Fields.Name: Effect Category
Fields.Description: Determines speffect stacking behavior

Fields.Name: Category Priority
Fields.Description: Determines the priority of stacking behavior, effects with higher priority will not be removed when one with a lower priority is applied. lower number = higher priority

Fields.Name: Save Category
Fields.Description: Effect will not be removed when quitting the game, only one effect within each category can be saved

Fields.Name: Magic Attunement Slot
Fields.Description: Alters the amount of sorcery slots the player has

Fields.Name: Miracle Attunement Slot
Fields.Description: Alters the amount of miracle slots the player has

Fields.Name: Humanity Damage
Fields.Description: Damage value given to humanity value

Fields.Name: Weapon Repel Defence +
Fields.Description: Set value to override repelling defense power

Fields.Name: Weapon Repel Absorption %
Fields.Description: Set value to override repelling defense power

Fields.Name: Damage Correction %: Burn
Fields.Description: Multiplies Burn damage

Fields.Description: Determines what stagger animations play when recieving dmgLevel 0

Fields.Description: Determines what stagger animations play when recieving dmgLevel 1

Fields.Description: Determines what stagger animations play when recieving dmgLevel 2

Fields.Description: Only apply this effect in NG+ or higher

Fields.Name: Affects Miracles
Fields.Description: Will this affect miracles?

Fields.Description: The number of sen you have becomes 0

Fields.Description: If checked, issue an intrusion_A request when activated

Fields.Description: If checked, a kick request will be issued at the time of activation.

Fields.Description: If checked, an exit request will be issued at the time of activation.

Fields.Description: If checked, an intrusion request to the NPC will be issued at the time of activation.

Fields.Description: Is it possible to become a corpse? If this is checked, you will not be in a dead state.

Fields.Description: When enabled and this effect alters max Hp, current Hp will be adjusted when max Hp is adjusted

Fields.Description: Does not sync online. This does not mean that it will be applied locally, but simply that it will not be sent over the internet. For example, remote characters do not activate locally, so nothing will happen in that case.
